arts.ttl: Viktoria Plzen v Manchester United: Europa League – live
arts.sum: Updates from 5.45pm GMT game in Czech Republic Live scores: follow all Thursday’s goals and games Ok. Enough beer – now football. Tonight’s match is an important one for United’s manager Amorim – it won’t just be about the Europa placing and trying to get into the automatic qualifying spots to progress to the last 16. He’ll also want to be put an end to a run of two bad defeats at Arsenal and at home to Nottingham Forest. There has been a lot of commentary around how the new manager is trying out his new team – bringing players into new positions, shaking things up and seeing how they fare. But results will have to come. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Sir Jim Ratcliffe told he is 'tearing Man Utd apart' in damning statement
arts.sum: New part-owner Ratcliffe has made a raft of seismic changes at Old Trafford - and they have not gone down well with Sam Allardyce

arts.ttl: Team News: Man United starting XI vs. Viktoria Plzen revealed as Ruben Amorim rings the changes
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim confirms his starting side for Thursday's Europa League contest with Viktoria Plzen, with the Portuguese again rotating his players.

arts.ttl: Jadon Sancho aims training dig at Erik ten Hag after Man United demand
arts.sum: Jadon Sancho was exiled from Manchester United after Erik ten Hag accused him of not performing to the right standards in training

arts.ttl: Viktoria Plzen vs Manchester United - Europa League: Live score, team news and updates as Ruben Amorim's men look to bounce back from consecutive defeats and move into automatic qualification spots
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest team news, updates and live score from the Europa League clash between Viktoria Plzen and Manchester United at Doosan Arena.

arts.ttl: Wonderkid 'convinced' he will make Man Utd transfer
arts.sum: Manchester United are edging closer to their first signing under Ruben Amorim after, with the mother of the prospective signing admitting her son is ‘convinced’ he will move to Old Trafford. United are understood to be in advanced talks to sign Paraguayan defender Diego Leon, with negotiations already underway with his club Cerro Porteno over a €4m move plus add-ons.

arts.ttl: Chelsea set to HIJACK €90m Man Utd transfer
arts.sum: The 22-year-old was expected to seal an Old Trafford transfer this summer, but Man Utd were unwilling to match Everton’s reported asking price of €90 million (£75m) and Branthwaite remained at Goodison Park. Chelsea have been tipped to rival Manchester United for the signing of Everton defender Jarrad Branthwaite in 2025.

arts.ttl: Viktoria Plzen vs Manchester United LIVE! Europa League match stream, team news, lineups, TV, prediction today
arts.sum: The Red Devils are aiming to make it three wins in a row in Europe

arts.ttl: Viktoria Plzen vs Man Utd LIVE: Europa League team news and line-ups as Red Devils try to get back on track
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim’s side look to bounce back from consecutive defeats with an away clash in Europe

arts.ttl: Man Utd transfer news: Gomes's reps now in talks with Red Devils
arts.sum: Angel Gomes ' representatives are in talks with Manchester United, according to reports, while he is on Tottenham's radar too. Over the last three years, Gomes has amassed 129 appearances for the French club.
